name: Mei's rapid expansion
description:
Your friend and Colleague, Mei, tested an experimental stretch mark lotion on herself and it caused her belly to quickly expand over the course of a week. She wants you to come over and help figure out what to do.

Additional tags: Pregnant, pregnancy, false pregnancy, belly expansion, bloated, bloat, about to burst (possible), about to pop (possible), lactation (possible)
